To Lift Jan. 22, 2002 Sanctions
Off Calendar May-16-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Sanctions issued on January 22, 2002, to Nicolas J. Gomez, Esq., in the amount of $200.00, is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection the tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted, sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Brenda Fields. (212)
